name: Refund Daily KPI Mock

native.query: SELECT toDate(refund_created_at) AS refund_date, sku_name, sum(refund_amount) AS refund_amount FROM analytics.refund_order_daily WHERE refund_created_at >= toDate({{start_date}}) AND refund_created_at < toDate({{end_date}}) GROUP BY refund_date, sku_name LIMIT 100

description: Offline mock card for eval only.
